subject: docs(cleanup): fix stale Style-tab section names in TESTING_GUIDE
body:
cold-branch audit caught two test steps still referencing the old UI
labels that doc-cleanup (74e296b) updated everywhere else:

- S3 step 1: "Typography" section → "Fonts" (matches StyleTab.jsx and
  USER_GUIDE.md).
- S4 step 2: "Style → Overlay" → "Style → Color Tint".

A tester following these steps would fail to locate the sections under
the renamed labels. Doc-cleanup touched USER_GUIDE.md + README.md but
missed the parallel references in TESTING_GUIDE.md.

Tags: docs, testing-guide, tidy, cold-audit
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: clean-sweep-2026-04
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_012r7JyJzHjENMhqhWtdGywz
title: fix stale Style-tab section names in TESTING_GUIDE
